user.title: Create virtual consumer
user.description: Create an Energy Device Bridge virtual consumer with a persistent Energy Dashboard total and swappable source entities.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure virtual consumer
reconfigure.description: Update this Energy Device Bridge consumer while preserving historical energy continuity.

error.duplicate_pair: This source power/energy pair is already used.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist.
error.must_be_sensor: The selected entity must be a sensor.
error.same_entity_pair: Power and energy entities must be different.
error.power_not_numeric: Power source must have numeric values.
error.energy_not_numeric: Energy source must have numeric values.
error.invalid_power_unit: Power source unit must be W or kW.
error.invalid_energy_unit: Energy source unit must be Wh or kWh.
error.invalid_energy_state_class: Energy source should use total or total_increasing state class.
